project.name: vibe-pm
project.description: An OpenCode plugin that replaces full AGENTS.md/rules loading with step-aware precision context injection — trims messages by current workflow step, injects minimal relevant context (AxioDB task state, Constitution, Regulations), and collects per-step metrics (token consumption, dwell time, human intervention).

nodes.label: FlowEngine
nodes.summary: Core business class implementing FSM step flow, three-layer sandwich context injection, message pruning pipeline, and LLM-driven step transitions. Located at src/engine/flow-engine.ts.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements IFlowEngine interface: onMessage, injectContext, transformMessages, onSessionIdle, parseFlow, readFlowContent, listFlows, startTask, setStep.
nodes.name: FlowEngine

nodes.label: Three-Layer Sandwich Injection
nodes.summary: Context injection strategy splitting injected content into three layers: Layer 1 (global overview ~900T, cache-stable) with Constitution, FSM diagram, step summaries; Layer 2 (current step detail ~900T) with instructions, regulations, task state; Layer 3 (lookahead window 0-600T) with next 1-2 consecutive non-HiL steps. Saves 40-60% tokens vs full flow injection. Uses MD5 fingerprint deduplication to skip re-injection within same step. Designed to preserve LLM prompt cache stability.
nodes.name: SandwichInjection

nodes.label: Message Pruning Pipeline
nodes.summary: Three-step message pruning algorithm: (1) tagMessagesByStep — assigns step IDs to messages based on step transition timeline, (2) assignDepthLevel — allocates depth 0 (current, preserved), depth 1 (previous, key decisions), depth 2 (two steps back, user content only), depth 3 (older, placeholder), with HiL steps adding +1 depth to prior messages, (3) pruneByDepth — executes top-down until token budget met. Lazy: only triggers when tokens > 80% of maxStepTokens. Protection: user messages max depth 2, current step tool results never pruned, injected context never pruned, minimum 3 recent messages always kept.
nodes.name: MessagePruning

nodes.label: MemorySystem
nodes.summary: Data persistence class wrapping AxioDB embedded database (JSON file storage). Manages Task, Discussion, FlowMetrics CRUD operations. Located at src/memory/memory-system.ts.
nodes.name: MemorySystem

nodes.label: Task
nodes.summary: Core data model representing an active task: sessionId (PK), flow name, currentStep (S1-Sn), currentStepName, startAt (ISO 8601), closed boolean, summary, optional specRef and planRef. Managed by Memory System. Lifecycle: Created → Running → Completed.
nodes.name: Task

nodes.label: Discussion
nodes.summary: Auto-generated improvement suggestion from post-task analysis: UUID id, fromSessionId (FK→Task), priority (high/medium/low), importance and severity (1-5), issue/reason/solution descriptions, optional decision field (user-filled on async review), taskSummary (copied from Task), createdAt/resolvedAt timestamps.
nodes.name: Discussion

nodes.label: FlowMetrics
nodes.summary: Per-step runtime metrics: sessionId (FK), flow, step, stepName, stepInCount (entries), tokensConsumed, dwellTime (ms), humanInterventionTime (ms), userInputTokens, taskSummary. Collected on step enter/exit by Metrics & Analysis module. Aggregated per flow for trend analysis.
nodes.name: FlowMetrics

nodes.label: PluginCore
nodes.summary: Plugin entry point (VibePMPlugin function in src/core/plugin.ts). Orchestrates all modules: loads config, initializes Memory System and Flow Engine, registers 8 /pm-* commands via dual config+tool hooks, binds lifecycle hooks (chat.message, system.transform, messages.transform, session.idle). Module integration via direct imports — no DI container.
nodes.name: PluginCore

nodes.label: TemplateManager
nodes.summary: Template management functions (scanTemplates, installTemplate, uninstallFlow in src/template/template-manager.ts). Pure file operations by path convention — no abstraction layer. Scans /docs/template/, copies to /docs/flow/, auto-generates .opencode/commands/{command}.md prompt files from Command metadata field.
nodes.name: TemplateManager

nodes.label: FSM (Finite State Machine)
nodes.summary: Step transition model defined via Mermaid stateDiagram in flow documents. Transitions are NOT hardcoded — the Flow Engine injects the FSM diagram and instructions into the system prompt and lets the LLM autonomously decide when to advance steps. HiL (human-in-loop) steps require user confirmation before advancing; non-HiL steps auto-advance on completion. Back-edges enable iterative refinement.
nodes.name: FSM

nodes.label: Human-in-loop (HiL)
nodes.summary: Design pattern for steps requiring user intervention. Marked by ⚠️ emoji in step title + blockquote warning in flow docs. At these steps, the LLM must use blocking question/confirm tools, asking only 1 question at a time, and wait for user response before continuing. HiL steps serve as natural breakpoints for message pruning (prior steps get +1 depth level) and cache optimization (injection skipped during user interaction). Common HiL steps: plan review, spec confirmation, user acceptance.
nodes.name: HumanInLoop

nodes.label: AxioDB
nodes.summary: Embedded database v9.6.6 used for structured memory (JSON file storage at .vibe-pm/data.json). Key constraints: no $set operator (UpdateOne accepts plain objects), queries return { statusCode, data: { documents } } wrapper, single process instance limit. Stores three collections: tasks, discussions, flowMetrics.
nodes.name: AxioDB

nodes.label: TUI Display
nodes.summary: Terminal status display showing active tasks with flow name, current step, elapsed time, per-step dwell-time bar chart (with HiL markers and current-step highlight), and total token consumption. Read-only consumer of Memory System. Currently Draft — rendering approach TBD (Option A: OpenCode sidebar injection; Option B: independent ANSI process).
nodes.name: TUIDisplay

nodes.label: Metrics & Analysis
nodes.summary: Per-step metrics collection and post-task analysis module. Collects StepTokenBreakdown across 7 buckets, uses StickyTokenCache (5-min TTL) for debouncing, identifies bottlenecks via dwellTime>30%, stepInCount>3, or humanIntervention>50% thresholds, and auto-generates prioritized Discussion items. Deterministic rule-based analysis (non-LLM). Currently Draft.
nodes.name: MetricsAnalysis

nodes.label: Constitution
nodes.summary: Top-level governance with 8 non-negotiable principles: Flow+Spec+Test-Driven, Type Safety Supreme, Verification Mandatory, Mermaid Diagrams Only, Module Independence, Minimal Change, SDK-First Development, Chinese-First Communication. Always injected into system prompt (Layer 1). Zero-tolerance table defines enforcement for violations (type escape, skipping S4, deleting failing tests, mixing refactor into bugfix). Takes precedence over all other regulations.
nodes.name: Constitution

nodes.label: Coding Style
nodes.summary: TypeScript coding standard: UTF-8/LF, 2-space indent, Prettier formatting, kebab-case files, camelCase variables, PascalCase types/classes, UPPER_SNAKE_CASE constants. Strict type safety rules (no any/@ts-ignore/empty catch), function design guidelines (object params over 3 args, Result<T,E> pattern), async/await convention, structured logging, and TODO/FIXME/HACK placeholder format.
nodes.name: CodingStyle
Feature Spec Template
nodes.summary: Feature Spec template document defining the standard structure for feature specification documents, including sections for requirements, user stories, design points, boundaries, test cases, constraints, and development progress.

nodes.name: Engine Errors
nodes.summary: Flow Engine错误类定义：DuplicateActiveTaskError（重复活跃任务）、FlowNotFoundError（流程文档缺失）、FlowParseError（文档解析失败）。

nodes.name: Main Entry
nodes.summary: vibe-pm插件主入口，re-export VibePMPlugin供OpenCode加载。

nodes.name: Memory Errors
nodes.summary: Memory System错误类定义：DuplicateTaskError（重复任务创建）和MemorySystemError（通用数据层错误）。

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Memory module barrel export — re-exports MemorySystem class, error classes (DuplicateTaskError, MemorySystemError), and core types (Task, Discussion, FlowMetrics, IMemorySystem).

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Template module barrel export — re-exports scanTemplates, installTemplate, uninstallFlow, listInstalledFlows, TemplateConflictError from template-manager, and TemplateMeta type.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Template Manager type definitions. Single interface TemplateMeta with id, name, category, description, version, command (slash command), flowPath, bundleDir.

nodes.name: DuplicateActiveTaskError
nodes.summary: Thrown when attempting to start a new task while an active task already exists in the current session. Provides details about the existing task.

nodes.name: FlowNotFoundError
nodes.summary: Thrown when a requested Flow document is not found in /docs/flow/.

nodes.name: FlowParseError
nodes.summary: Thrown when a Flow document fails to parse correctly.

nodes.name: DuplicateTaskError
nodes.summary: Thrown when attempting to create a second Task for a session that already has an active task. Data-layer level enforcement of one-active-task-per-session constraint.

nodes.name: MemorySystemError
nodes.summary: Generic data-layer error for the MemorySystem.

nodes.name: template-scan.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for template manager: scanTemplates finds/parses meta, skips non-bundle dirs, installTemplate copies to flow dir with regulations, overwrite error, uninstallFlow removal, listInstalledFlows.

nodes.title: TypeScript Configuration
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration targeting ES2022 with NodeNext module resolution, strict mode enabled, outputs to dist/ with declarations and source maps, sources from src/.
nodes.content: compilerOptions: target=ES2022, module=NodeNext, moduleResolution=NodeNext, strict=true, esModuleInterop=true, skipLibCheck=true, forceConsistentCasingInFileNames=true, outDir=./dist, rootDir=./src, declaration=true, sourceMap=true. Includes src/**/*.ts, excludes node_modules and dist.
nodes.name: TypeScript Configuration

nodes.title: Vitest Configuration
nodes.summary: Vitest test runner configuration with a single test include pattern matching tests/**/*.test.ts, using the default Vitest config export pattern.
nodes.content: Exports a default defineConfig with test.include set to ["tests/**/*.test.ts"]. Simple configuration — all test files live under tests/ and follow the *.test.ts naming convention.
nodes.name: Vitest Configuration
.gitignore
nodes.summary: Git忽略规则文件，排除node_modules、dist、.vibe-pm等构建产物和运行时数据目录。

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: understand-anything工具的忽略规则，排除.ui-model、node_modules、.git等分析无关目录。

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: understand-anything工具的自动更新配置，控制知识图谱分析行为。

nodes.name: knowledge-graph.json
nodes.summary: 自动生成的项目知识图谱数据，包含节点、边、分层和导览信息。

nodes.name: meta.json
nodes.summary: 知识图谱分析元数据，记录分析时间、Git提交哈希和分析文件数。

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: vibe-pm项目入口文档，定义技术栈、交互要求、核心概念（双层记忆体系、FSM驱动任务模型、上下文注入）和ANTI-PATTERNS。

nodes.name: test-flow.md
nodes.summary: 测试流程定义，包含S1-S4四个步骤（理解需求、设计方案、Human-in-loop审查、实现）及FSM状态机。

nodes.name: coding_style.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript编码风格规范，涵盖文件组织、命名、类型安全、函数设计、异步处理和导出规范等22个章节的详细规则。

nodes.name: constitution.md
nodes.summary: vibe-pm项目宪章，定义8条核心原则（流程+Spec+测试驱动开发、类型安全至上、验证强制性等）及附加约束和零容忍规则。

nodes.name: dictionary.md
nodes.summary: 术语字典，定义核心概念、任务模型、记忆体系、流程相关和技术栈术语的标准名称与含义。

nodes.name: vibe-pm-flow-engine.md
nodes.summary: Flow Engine设计规格，定义10个公共API（detectFlowCmd、ensureTaskAndInject、startTask等）、注入标签格式、任务创建流程和FSM流转逻辑。

nodes.name: vibe-pm-memory-system.md
nodes.summary: Memory System设计规格，基于AxioDB的双层记忆体系，包含Task、Discussion、FlowMetrics数据模型和完整生命周期接口设计。

nodes.name: vibe-pm-overall.md
nodes.summary: vibe-pm总体设计文档，描述系统四层架构（Plugin Core→Flow Engine→Memory System→Template Manager）、核心数据流和对话生命周期。

nodes.name: vibe-pm-plugin-core.md
nodes.summary: Plugin Core设计规格，定义OpenCode插件命令注册（config hook声明式+tool hook可执行）、生命周期钩子编排、配置管理和模块接入机制。

nodes.name: vibe-pm-roadmap.md
nodes.summary: 交付路线图，规划4个阶段（MVP核心4周→模板1周→增强2周→收尾1周）及里程碑和风险缓解策略。

nodes.name: vibe-pm-template-manager.md
nodes.summary: Template Manager设计规格，定义模板安装/卸载工作流、Command文件自动生成机制和内置模板清单（bug-fix、design-spec等）。

nodes.name: bug-fix/flow.md
nodes.summary: Bug修复流程模板，包含S1-S9九个步骤（理解Bug→根因分析→审查方案→编写修复→编写测试→回归验证→自查→用户验收→合流）。

nodes.name: coding-style-template.md
nodes.summary: 编码风格模板（语言无关），提供可复用的编码规范骨架，含文件组织、命名、类型安全、函数设计等25个章节的占位模板。

nodes.name: constitution-template.md
nodes.summary: 项目宪章模板，提供6条通用核心原则模板（流程驱动开发、类型安全、验证强制性、Mermaid图表优先、最小变更、中文优先沟通）。

nodes.name: design-spec/flow.md
nodes.summary: Spec设计流程模板，包含S1-S6六个步骤（理解需求→探索已知事实→标记缺口→渐进式访谈→设计→用户审查）。

nodes.name: Dictionary Template
nodes.summary: 术语字典模板，定义项目核心概念、任务模型、流程相关和通用术语的中英文对照表。作为本地化语言↔英文术语转换的参考文档。

nodes.name: Flow Template
nodes.summary: Flow文档模板，定义流程文档的标准格式，包括适用场景、输入要求、交付清单、Mermaid状态机、步骤定义（S1-Sn）及Human-in-loop标记规范。

nodes.name: Large Refactor Flow
nodes.summary: 大规模重构流程模板（Template ID: large-refactor），13步流程覆盖影响范围评估→迁移路径→兼容性验证→合流的完整重构生命周期，含3个Human-in-loop节点。

nodes.name: Migration Checklist
nodes.summary: 大规模重构兼容性验证清单，涵盖接口兼容性、数据兼容性、测试覆盖和迁移路径四大验证维度，用于S10兼容性验证步骤。

nodes.name: Research Flow
nodes.summary: 调研任务流程模板（Template ID: research），6步调研工作流（理解意图→探索事实→标记缺口→渐进式访谈→执行→审查），用于需求梳理和技术方案设计。

nodes.name: Spec-Driven Development Flow
nodes.summary: Spec驱动开发流程模板（Template ID: spec-driven-dev），12步标准化开发流程（理解→标记缺口→访谈→设计Spec→确认→计划→评审→编码→测试→自查→审查→合流），含4个Human-in-loop节点和代码审查集成。

nodes.name: Feature Spec Template
nodes.summary: Feature Spec文档模板，定义功能规格说明的标准结构：需求背景、用户故事（P1/P2/P3优先级）、设计要点（领域模型/接口/配置）、边界与错误、测试用例和开发进度。

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: vibe-pm npm包配置文件，定义ES模块类型、构建/测试/类型检查脚本，依赖@opencode-ai/plugin、axiodb、tiktoken、zod等核心库。

nodes.name: pnpm-lock.yaml
nodes.summary: pnpm依赖锁定文件，记录完整的依赖树和版本哈希，确保环境可重现。

nodes.name: Commands
nodes.summary: 命令注册模块，通过config hook（声明式）和tool hook（可执行）注册8个/pm-*命令。可执行命令调用FlowEngine和MemorySystem实现业务逻辑，使用@opencode-ai/plugin SDK的tool()工厂函数。

nodes.name: Config
nodes.summary: 配置管理模块，从项目目录加载.vibe-pm.json，支持默认值合并覆盖和容错处理，启动时自动创建默认配置文件。

nodes.name: Core Index
nodes.summary: Plugin Core统一导出入口，re-export VibePMPlugin、配置函数、命令注册函数、logger和所有类型定义。

nodes.name: Logger
nodes.summary: 日志工具模块，通过OpenCode SDK的app.log()写入宿主日志系统。提供initLogger、setLogEnabled和logger实例（debug/info/warn/error），包含调用方文件追踪和Error序列化。

nodes.name: Plugin
nodes.summary: 插件主函数VibePMPlugin，初始化配置、MemorySystem、FlowEngine并注册三个钩子：config（命令声明）、tool（可执行工具）、experimental.chat.messages.transform（上下文注入和命令检测）。

nodes.name: Types
nodes.summary: Plugin Core类型定义模块，定义PluginConfig（语言/数据目录/上下文注入/调试）、IPluginContext、ILogger、ModuleHooks等核心接口和类型。Re-export SDK的Plugin/PluginInput/Hooks/Config/ToolContext/ToolDefinition/tool。

nodes.name: FlowEngine
nodes.summary: 流程引擎核心模块，实现FlowEngine类：命令检测（detectFlowCmd）、任务生命周期管理（startTask/setStep/closeTask）、上下文注入（buildControlPrompt/ensureTaskAndInject/removeControlPrompt）和命令→流程映射（buildCommandFlowMap）。

nodes.name: Engine Index
nodes.summary: Engine模块统一导出入口，re-export FlowEngine类、StartTaskParams类型和三个错误类。

nodes.name: registerCommands
nodes.summary: 声明式注册8个/pm-*命令声明到OpenCode的config中，设置agent为'build'。

nodes.name: registerTools
nodes.summary: 遍历COMMANDS列表，为executable命令创建对应的ToolDefinition并注册到OpenCode tool hook。

nodes.name: createTaskStartTool
nodes.summary: 创建pm_task_start工具定义，接受flow/summary/specRef/planRef参数，调用FlowEngine.startTask创建新任务。

nodes.name: createTaskSetStepTool
nodes.summary: 创建pm_task_set_step工具定义，接受step参数，调用FlowEngine.setStep手动跳转到指定步骤。

nodes.name: createTaskRefreshTool
nodes.summary: 创建pm_task_refresh工具定义（无参数），返回上下文注入已改为文件引用模式的提示信息。

nodes.name: createTaskCloseTool
nodes.summary: 创建pm_task_close工具定义（无参数），调用FlowEngine.closeTask关闭当前任务并返回摘要信息。

nodes.name: createInstallFlowTool
nodes.summary: 创建pm_install_flow工具定义，接受templateId参数，调用installTemplate安装流程模板或列出可用模板。

nodes.name: loadConfig
nodes.summary: 从项目目录加载.vibe-pm.json，深度合并默认配置（含嵌套contextInjection），解析失败时回退到默认值。

nodes.name: writeConfig
nodes.summary: 将PluginConfig序列化为JSON写入.vibe-pm.json文件。

nodes.name: ensureDefaultConfig
nodes.summary: 检查.vibe-pm.json是否存在，若不存在则写入默认配置，返回是否创建。

nodes.name: initLogger
nodes.summary: 初始化日志客户端引用，设置LogClient实例用于后续日志写入。

nodes.name: setLogEnabled
nodes.summary: 设置日志开关，控制日志输出启用/禁用。

nodes.name: getCallerFile
nodes.summary: 通过Error.stack追踪获取调用方文件名（不含路径和扩展名），跳过logger.ts自身帧，用于日志service字段。

nodes.name: toExtra
nodes.summary: 将日志附加数据转换为Record格式：Error提取message和stack，对象过滤null/undefined字段，其他转字符串。

nodes.name: write
nodes.summary: 异步日志写入核心函数，调用OpenCode SDK的client.app.log()，自动提取调用方文件名作为service字段，异常静默失败。

nodes.name: logger
nodes.summary: ILogger接口实例，提供debug/info/warn/error四个日志级别方法，委托给内部write函数。

nodes.name: VibePMPlugin
nodes.summary: 插件主入口函数，初始化配置和日志、创建MemorySystem和FlowEngine，注册config/tool/chat.messages.transform/event四个钩子到OpenCode。

nodes.name: DuplicateActiveTaskError
nodes.summary: 在已有活跃任务的session中启动新任务时的错误类，携带现有任务信息（flow/step/name/summary/time）。

nodes.name: FlowNotFoundError
nodes.summary: 请求的Flow文档在docs/flow/中不存在时的错误类。

nodes.name: FlowParseError
nodes.summary: Flow文档解析失败时的错误类，携带解析失败原因。

nodes.name: FlowEngine
nodes.summary: 流程引擎核心类（13个方法），管理任务生命周期（startTask/setStep/closeTask）、命令检测与解析（detectFlowCmd/resolveFlowFromCommand）、上下文注入（buildControlPrompt/ensureTaskAndInject/removeControlPrompt）和流程文档映射（buildCommandFlowMap/flowExists/tryParseStepName）。

nodes.name: DuplicateTaskError
nodes.summary: 为已有活跃任务的session创建第二个Task时的错误类，携带sessionId。

nodes.name: MemorySystemError
nodes.summary: MemorySystem通用数据层错误类，携带自定义错误信息。

nodes.name: memory-system.ts
nodes.summary: Core data layer of vibe-pm. Implements MemorySystem class wrapping AxioDB embedded JSON DB with three collections — tasks (FSM-driven task state), discussions (async review-friendly), flowMetrics (step-level token/dwell metrics).

nodes.name: unwrapArray
nodes.summary: Safely extracts document array from AxioDB query result. Returns empty array as fallback instead of throwing.

nodes.name: unwrapSingle
nodes.summary: Extracts first document from AxioDB query result. Returns null when no match found.

nodes.name: generateId
nodes.summary: Generates UUID v4 via crypto.randomUUID for Discussion and FlowMetrics document IDs.

nodes.name: MemorySystem
nodes.summary: Structured memory layer for vibe-pm. Manages three AxioDB collections: tasks (FSM state), discussions (async-review items), flowMetrics (step-level token/dwell metrics). Implements IMemorySystem with full CRUD for all three collections plus accumulator logic for step-entry/exit metrics.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Type definitions for the memory system. Defines Task, CreateTaskInput, Discussion, CreateDiscussionInput, FlowMetrics interfaces and the IMemorySystem contract interface with full method signatures for init, task/discussion/metrics CRUD.

nodes.name: Task
nodes.summary: Task entity with FSM state fields: documentId, sessionId, flow, currentStep, currentStepName, startAt, closed, summary, optional specRef/planRef.

nodes.name: Discussion
nodes.summary: Discussion entity for async-review items: id, session ref, priority/importance/severity ratings, issue/reason/solution, optional decision, timestamps.

nodes.name: FlowMetrics
nodes.summary: Per-step metrics entity: session/flow/step identifiers, stepInCount, tokensConsumed, dwellTime, humanInterventionTime, userInputTokens, taskSummary.

nodes.name: IMemorySystem
nodes.summary: Complete contract interface for the memory system: init, full task CRUD with duplicate prevention, discussion CRUD with priority/status filtering, flow metrics entry/exit recording and query.

nodes.name: template-manager.ts
nodes.summary: Pure file-system template manager with zero external dependencies. Scans template bundles from docs/template/, installs them (flow docs, regulations, constitution, dictionary, coding-style, DCP config, command file generation), uninstalls with command file cleanup, lists installed flows. Includes language detection (10 languages) and per-language coding-style template generation with 28 configurable defaults fields.

nodes.name: TemplateConflictError
nodes.summary: Custom error thrown when installing a flow that already exists in /docs/flow/ — suggests --force to overwrite.

nodes.name: scanTemplates
nodes.summary: Scans docs/template/ directories, parses TemplateMeta from each bundle's flow.md via parseTemplateMeta regex extraction. Skips dirs without flow.md.

nodes.name: installTemplate
nodes.summary: Full install pipeline: copies flow.md to docs/flow/, installs bundled regulations, generates constitution/dictionary/coding-style from templates if missing, writes DCP protection config, generates .opencode/commands/*.md command file.

nodes.name: uninstallFlow
nodes.summary: Removes flow markdown from docs/flow/ and cleans up corresponding command file in .opencode/commands/ (trying both pm-{name}.md and {name}.md patterns).

nodes.name: listInstalledFlows
nodes.summary: Lists installed flows by scanning docs/flow/*.md, stripping [flow] prefix and .md suffix.

nodes.name: parseTemplateMeta
nodes.summary: Parses template metadata from flow.md content using regex: Template ID, name (from h1), Category, Description, Version, Command fields. Returns TemplateMeta or null if required fields missing.

nodes.name: generateCommandFile
nodes.summary: Generates .opencode/commands/*.md content from TemplateMeta: title, flow control section with command trigger and flow file reference.

nodes.name: detectProjectLanguages
nodes.summary: Detects project languages by checking for marker files (tsconfig.json, Cargo.toml, etc.) and optional package.json dependencies. TypeScript overrides JavaScript when both detected.

nodes.name: generateCodingStyle
nodes.summary: Generates language-specific coding style document by reading template, detecting primary language, applying 28 defaults (naming, formatting, type safety, async patterns, error handling, logging, comments, exports) via regex placeholders.

nodes.name: writeDcpConfig
nodes.summary: Writes/merges Dynamic Context Pruning config (dcp.jsonc) with vibe-pm protect tags (pm-constitution, pm-flow-control) and protected file patterns, only if DCP plugin is installed.

nodes.name: TemplateMeta
nodes.summary: Template metadata parsed from flow.md: unique id, display name, category, description, version, associated slash command, flow.md path, bundle root directory.

nodes.name: commands.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for command/tool registration. Verifies all 8 pm-* commands registered with template/description/agent, 5 executable tools (pm_install_flow, pm_task_start, pm_task_set_step, pm_task_refresh, pm_task_close) with correct behavior, error handling for missing sessionID.

nodes.name: config.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for config management: loadConfig defaults/override/deep-merge/invalid-JSON fallback, ensureDefaultConfig creates when missing and skips when exists.

nodes.name: logger.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for logger utility: uninitialized safety, enable/disable toggle, info calls with correct params/levels, Error object conversion to extra fields, non-object/non-string data handling.

nodes.name: plugin.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for VibePMPlugin: hook registration (config, tool, messages.transform, event), synthetic part injection on auto-slash-command detection, stale control prompt cleanup, session+flow deduplication.

nodes.name: task-start.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for task start and buildControlPrompt: successful creation, duplicate rejection, missing flow error, command→flow resolution, plus comprehensive prompt generation tests (constitution priority, hierarchy, mode conflicts, red lines, step gates, startup/execution loops).

nodes.name: data-file.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for AxioDB data file initialization: verifies data directory created on first run and CRUD works after init.

nodes.name: task-crud.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for Task CRUD via MemorySystem: create/query, active task filtering (closed exclusion), step update, duplicate task rejection, listActiveTasks aggregation.

nodes.name: command-generation.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for command file generation: TemplateMeta command parsing, installTemplate creates .opencode/commands/*.md with correct structure, no-command skip, uninstallFlow cleanup of command files.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration: targets ES2022 with NodeNext module resolution, strict mode enabled, outputs to dist/ with declarations and source maps, includes only src/**/*.ts.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest test runner configuration: includes tests/**/*.test.ts pattern.

edges.description: FlowEngine's DuplicateActiveTaskError wraps MemorySystem's DuplicateTaskError with richer task context
TemplateMeta type validated through scanTemplates returns
Imports template barrel for scan/install/uninstall testing

edges.label: flow engine reads/writes task state via memory
constitution principle I references coding style
template derived from coding style rules
example flow consumed by flow engine

layers.name: Plugin Core
layers.description: Plugin entry point (src/index.ts), lifecycle hooks, command/tool registration, configuration loading, logger — orchestration hub importing from all submodules

layers.name: Flow Engine
layers.description: FSM-driven flow execution — parses flow definitions, performs sandwich context injection, manages message pruning pipeline, LLM-driven step transitions

layers.name: Memory System
layers.description: AxioDB persistence layer — embedded JSON-file database for Task, Discussion, FlowMetrics CRUD; error definitions; type schemas

layers.name: Template Manager
layers.description: Flow template management — scanning built-in templates, installing/uninstalling flows, auto-generating command files, detecting project languages

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Vitest test suites mirroring src/ structure — unit tests for plugin core (commands, config, logger, plugin), flow engine (task start integration), memory system (CRUD, data file), and template manager (scan, command generation)

layers.name: Specifications
layers.description: Design specification documents — authoritative design source for all modules; each spec defines domain models, interfaces, data flow, caching strategy, and test specifications

layers.name: Templates And Regulations
layers.description: Project governance — built-in flow templates (5 templates: research, project-build, new-feature, bug-fix, large-refactor), constitution, coding style, dictionary, OpenCode session rules, and installed flow definitions

layers.name: Project Config
layers.description: Project-level configuration and metadata — package manifest, TypeScript/Vitest configs, gitignore, lockfile, root AGENTS.md onboarding doc, documentation root directory, and .understand-anything knowledge graph tool artifacts

tour.title: 入口点与模块总览 — src/index.ts → src/core/index.ts
tour.description: src/index.ts 是 OpenCode 加载插件的唯一入口，仅做一件事：re-export VibePMPlugin。真正的编排在 src/core/plugin.ts 的 VibePMPlugin 函数中——初始化 Config、Logger、MemorySystem、FlowEngine 四大模块并注册 lifecycle hooks。src/core/index.ts 作为 barrel export，统一暴露所有 core 模块的公共 API。
tour.languageLesson: TypeScript barrel file (index.ts) 模式：用 import + re-export 聚合子模块 API，外部只需 `import { ... } from './core'` 即可访问所有导出，降低 import 路径噪音。

tour.title: 类型系统基础 — src/core/types.ts
tour.description: src/core/types.ts 是整个项目的类型根基——fan-in 最高（8 个模块依赖它）。定义 PluginConfig（语言/数据目录/上下文注入/调试开关）、IPluginContext、ILogger、ModuleHooks 等核心接口，并 re-export OpenCode SDK 的 Plugin/PluginInput/Hooks/Config/ToolContext/ToolDefinition/tool 类型。任何模块的类型需求都从这里导入。
tour.languageLesson: TypeScript 的 discriminated union 与 Zod schema 对应关系：PluginConfig 同时作为 TS type（编译时）和 Zod 校验对象（运行时），确保 .vibe-pm.json 的类型安全——这种「编译时类型 + 运行时校验」双重保障是项目中所有配置加载的模式。

tour.title: 配置管理 — src/core/config.ts
tour.description: src/core/config.ts 管理 .vibe-pm.json 的完整生命周期：loadConfig（深度合并用户配置与默认值，JSON 解析失败回退）、ensureDefaultConfig（首次运行自动创建默认配置）、writeConfig（序列化写入）。配置对象 `PluginConfig` 由 src/core/types.ts 中的 Zod schema 校验，确保运行时类型安全。
tour.languageLesson: 对象深度合并（deep merge）模式：`mergeDefaults` 对嵌套对象递归合并而非简单覆盖——用户的 `contextInjection.maxStepTokens` 可以单独覆盖，不影响同层的其他字段。这是防御性配置设计的标准做法。

tour.title: 日志系统 — src/core/logger.ts
tour.description: src/core/logger.ts 是贯穿所有模块的诊断基础设施。通过 OpenCode SDK 的 `app.log()` 写入宿主日志，提供 initLogger/setLogEnabled 初始化和 `logger` 实例（debug/info/warn/error 四级）。`getCallerFile()` 通过 Error.stack 自动追踪调用方文件名作为 service 字段，`toExtra()` 处理 Error 序列化。
tour.languageLesson: 调用栈追踪技巧：`getCallerFile()` 通过 `new Error().stack` 获取栈帧，跳过 logger.ts 自身的帧，提取调用方文件名——这是一种零侵入的调用方自动识别方案，无需手动传参。

tour.title: 命令注册系统 — src/core/commands.ts
tour.description: src/core/commands.ts 实现 8 个 /pm-* 命令的双通道注册：config hook（声明式——告诉 OpenCode 这些命令存在，设置 agent='build'）和 tool hook（可执行——为每个命令创建 ToolDefinition，通过 SDK 的 `tool()` 工厂函数连接 FlowEngine/MemorySystem/TemplateManager 的业务逻辑）。5 个可执行命令各由一个工厂函数 createXxxTool 创建。
tour.languageLesson: OpenCode Plugin SDK 的 tool() 工厂函数模式：每个工具通过 `tool({ name, description, parameters, execute })` 定义——parameters 用 JSON Schema 描述入参（OpenCode 自动生成参数校验），execute 是异步回调。这是命令注册的标准范式。

tour.title: 流程引擎（上）— FSM 与任务生命周期
tour.description: src/engine/flow-engine.ts 是核心业务层的 FlowEngine 类（13 个方法）。任务生命周期方法：startTask（创建任务 + 注入初始上下文）、setStep（手动跳转步骤）、closeTask（关闭任务 + 生成摘要）。命令检测方法：detectFlowCmd（从用户消息解析 /pm-* 命令）、resolveFlowFromCommand（命令名→flow 文档的映射 buildCommandFlowMap）。领域错误类在 src/engine/errors.ts 中定义。
tour.languageLesson: 领域错误类层次：DuplicateActiveTaskError 包裹 MemorySystem 的 DuplicateTaskError，附带更丰富的任务上下文（flow/step/name/summary/time）——这是一种错误包装（Error Wrapping）模式，让上层能获得更多诊断信息而非原始的低层异常。

tour.title: 流程引擎（下）— 上下文注入与消息裁剪
tour.description: buildControlPrompt 是上下文注入的核心——将 Constitution (Layer 1)、当前步骤的 flow document 指令和 regulations (Layer 2)、以及可选的下一个非 HiL 步骤 (Layer 3) 组装成 system prompt 注入。removeControlPrompt 清理旧的注入。消息裁剪策略采用 MD5 指纹去重（同一 flow+step+regulations 组合不重复注入），在 80% token 阈值时触发懒修剪（lazy pruning），最小保留 3 条最近消息。参考设计：docs/spec/vibe-pm-flow-engine.md。
tour.languageLesson: 三层夹层注入（Sandwich Injection）策略：Layer 1 全局概览 ~900T（缓存友好）、Layer 2 当前步骤详情 ~900T、Layer 3 前瞻窗口 0-600T——相比全量流程注入节省 40-60% tokens。通过 MD5(feed:step:regulations) 指纹避免同步骤重复注入。这是一种 Prompt Cache Optimization 的生产级实践。

tour.title: 记忆系统 — AxioDB 持久化
tour.description: src/memory/memory-system.ts 是数据持久层，实现 IMemorySystem 接口，封装 AxioDB v9.6.6 嵌入式 JSON 数据库（.vibe-pm/data.json）。管理三个 collection：tasks（FSM 任务状态）、discussions（异步审阅建议）、flowMetrics（步骤级 token/停留时间指标）。src/memory/types.ts 定义 Task/Discussion/FlowMetrics 实体和 IMemorySystem 完整合约。`unwrapArray`/`unwrapSingle` 安全处理 AxioDB 查询结果包裹。
tour.languageLesson: AxioDB 嵌入式数据库的关键约束：UpdateOne() 接受纯对象（无 $set 操作符），查询返回 `{ statusCode, data: { documents } }` 包裹。unwrapArray/unwrapSingle 是防御性工具函数，将 AxioDB 的嵌套返回结构展开为 `T[]` 或 `T|null`，隔离实现细节——这是 Adapter 模式在数据层的应用。

tour.title: 模板管理器 — 流程模板的安装与卸载
tour.description: src/template/template-manager.ts 是纯文件系统操作模块——无外部依赖，按路径约定（docs/template/ → docs/flow/）管理模板生命周期。scanTemplates 扫描模板目录、parseTemplateMeta 用正则解析 Template ID/Category/Command 元数据、installTemplate 执行完整安装流水线（复制 flow.md + 安装 regulations + 生成 constitution/dictionary/coding-style + 写入 DCP 配置 + 自动生成 .opencode/commands/*.md 命令文件）、uninstallFlow 同步清理 flow 文件和命令文件。src/template/types.ts 定义 TemplateMeta 接口。
tour.languageLesson: 纯文件操作模块的设计原则：不引入抽象层（无 ITemplateManager），直接按路径约定读写——这是 AGENTS.md 中明确规定的 ANTI-PATTERN 禁止项。'约定优于配置'（Convention over Configuration）在文件系统层同样适用。

tour.title: 测试体系 — vitest 驱动的模块验证
tour.description: 测试文件镜像 src/ 的目录结构：tests/core/（commands/config/logger/plugin 四个测试）、tests/engine/（task-start.test.ts，测试 FlowEngine 最核心的任务创建和 prompt 生成）、tests/memory/（data-file.test.ts + task-crud.test.ts，验证 AxioDB 初始化和 CRUD）、tests/template/（command-generation.test.ts + template-scan.test.ts）。vitest.config.ts 配置 include 模式 `tests/**/*.test.ts`。所有测试使用真实 AxioDB 实例（不 mock 内部实现），符合 ANTI-PATTERNS 规定。
tour.languageLesson: 嵌入数据库测试的最佳实践：AxioDB 作为嵌入式 JSON 数据库无网络开销，测试直接使用真实实例而非 mock——这使得测试既是单元测试又是轻量集成测试，且无副作用。vitest 的 `beforeEach` 中清理数据目录即可确保隔离。

tour.title: 构建配置 — package.json 与 tsconfig.json
tour.description: package.json 定义 v0.1.0 的 ESM 模块（type: module），运行时依赖 axiodb/zod/tiktoken 三剑客，开发依赖 @opencode-ai/plugin SDK。scripts 涵盖 build（tsc）、test（vitest run）、typecheck（tsc --noEmit）。tsconfig.json 启用 strict: true、ES2022 target、NodeNext module resolution——这是 Constitution 第二条「Type Safety Supreme」的工程保障。所有代码必须在 `pnpm typecheck` 和 `pnpm test` 通过后才能提交。
tour.languageLesson: TypeScript strict mode 的含义：`strict: true` 启用 8 个子选项（strictNullChecks、noImplicitAny、strictFunctionTypes 等），与 Constitution 的「NO any/@ts-ignore/empty catch」相呼应。NodeNext module resolution 确保与 ESM 的 `.js` 扩展名约定兼容。
